message:
fix(connectors): redact secrets from Debug output and fix MS365 URL parameter encoding

Secret redaction — replace derive(Debug) with manual Debug impls that
print [REDACTED] for sensitive fields:
- arxiv: ArxivConfig.scholar_api_key
- dingtalk: CachedAccessToken.token
- microsoft365: OAuthTokenResponse.access_token
- paypal: CachedToken.access_token
- qq: CachedAccessToken.token

This prevents access tokens and API keys from appearing in logs,
tracing output, or error messages that include debug-printed structs.

microsoft365/client.rs: Fix URL parameter injection in list_messages —
replace manual string concatenation of $top/$skip/$filter OData
parameters with reqwest::Url::query_pairs_mut() for proper encoding.
Previously, a filter value containing & or = could break the query
string structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
